nasb.text: When she brought up one of her cubs, He became a lion, And he learned to tear his prey; He devoured men.

esv.text: And she brought up one of her cubs; he became a young lion, and he learned to catch prey; he devoured men.

cnv.text: 牠養大其中一隻小獅子， 這幼獅成了一隻少壯的獅子， 學會了撕碎獵物， 把人吃掉。

ccb.text: 她养大一只幼狮， 使它成为雄壮的狮子。 它学会了捕食吃人。
